creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
luigi       2009-12-08 10:09:02 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/syslinux    Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    sysutils/syslinux/files patch-1 patch-2 
  Added files:
    sysutils/syslinux/files patch-com32_lib_MCONFIG 
                            patch-libinstaller_syslinux.h 
                            patch-mtools_syslinux.c 
  Removed files:
    sysutils/syslinux/files patch-boot_option 
  Log:
  Update to 3.83
  This is basically PR ports/141166 by Boris Samorodov, which
  updates the code to version 3.83 and splits the patches
  into smaller chunks to ease future updates.
  
  I have only touched the indentation in one function in patch-mtools_syslinux.c
  
  Submitted-by:   Boris Samorodov
  PR:     141166
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4       +2 -2      ports/sysutils/syslinux/Makefile
  1.2       +3 -3      ports/sysutils/syslinux/distinfo
  1.2       +0 -76     ports/sysutils/syslinux/files/patch-1
  1.2       +0 -22     ports/sysutils/syslinux/files/patch-2
  1.2       +0 -65     ports/sysutils/syslinux/files/patch-boot_option (dead)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/sysutils/syslinux/files/patch-com32_lib_MCONFIG (new)
  1.1       +21 -0     ports/sysutils/syslinux/files/patch-libinstaller_syslinux.h (new)
  1.1       +119 -0    ports/sysutils/syslinux/files/patch-mtools_syslinux.c (new)
  1.2       +6 -1      ports/sysutils/syslinux/pkg-plist
